title: PaymentMethod
description: Represents a payment method stored in the Braintree Vault. This is a polymorphic object that may represent a credit card, PayPal account, Venmo account, or other supported payment type.

token.description: Unique token identifying this vaulted payment method. Used as a reference for future transactions.

customer_id.description: The identifier of the customer who owns this payment method.

default.description: Indicates whether this is the customer's default payment method.

image_url.description: URL of an image representing the payment method type.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this payment method was vaulted, in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this payment method was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.
